create-pdf-with-acroform-text-field.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Text Field
create-pdf-with-acroform-text-field.description: Shows how to generate a new PDF, add an AcroForm, and place a visible text box field on the first page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-top-checkbox.title: Create PDF with Top‑Positioned Checkbox Field
create-pdf-with-top-checkbox.description: Shows how to create a new PDF document, add an AcroForm, and place a checkbox field near the top of the page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-gender-radio-button.title: Create PDF with Gender Radio Button Group
create-pdf-gender-radio-button.description: Shows how to generate a PDF, add an AcroForm radio button field for gender selection, and save the file using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-list-box-acroform.title: Create PDF with List Box AcroForm
create-pdf-with-list-box-acroform.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add an AcroForm list box field, fill it with country options, and save the file.

create-acroform-pdf-with-text-field-appe.title: Create AcroForm PDF with Text Field Appearance
create-acroform-pdf-with-text-field-appe.description: The example creates a new PDF, adds an AcroForm text box field, and sets its default appearance including font, size, and color.

fill-pdf-text-field.title: Fill PDF Text Field with a Value
fill-pdf-text-field.description: Loads an existing PDF, finds a text form field by its name, assigns a provided string to the field, and saves the modified PDF.

set-checkbox-field-in-pdf.title: Set Checkbox Field Value in PDF
set-checkbox-field-in-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, locates a checkbox form field by name, sets it to checked or unchecked based on input, and saves the modified document.

select-radio-button-option-in-pdf.title: Select Radio Button Option in PDF
select-radio-button-option-in-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, locates the first radio button field, selects a specified option, and saves the modified document.

select-list-box-option-by-index.title: Select List Box Option by Index in PDF
select-list-box-option-by-index.description: Loads a PDF, locates ListBox form fields, sets the selected entry using a 1‑based index, and saves the updated document.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-dictionary.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from a Dictionary
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-dictionary.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over all form fields, and assigns values from a dictionary using the field's full name. The modified document is then saved to a new file.

read-pdf-form-field-value.title: Read PDF Form Field Value
read-pdf-form-field-value.description: Loads a PDF document, locates a form field by its name, and writes the field's value or state to the console, handling common field types.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts all form field values, and serializes them into a JSON string using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF containing form fields and export its form data and document structure to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-xfdf-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Form Data into PDF
import-xfdf-form-data-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read XFDF (XML) form data, import the field values into the PDF form, and save the updated document.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON and Save to Text File
export-pdf-form-data-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with form fields using Aspose.Pdf, export the form data to JSON, and write the JSON string to a text file.

import-json-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import JSON Form Data into PDF
import-json-form-data-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, import form field values from a JSON string, and save the updated document.

post-pdf-form-data-xml.title: Post PDF Form Data as XML to a Remote Endpoint
post-pdf-form-data-xml.description: Loads a PDF, extracts its form fields, builds an XML document with the field names and values, and posts the XML to a specified HTTP endpoint.

add-blank-page-to-pdf-form.title: Add Blank Page to PDF Form While Preserving Fields
add-blank-page-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF form, insert a new blank page, and save the document, keeping all existing form fields intact.

add-new-page-with-acroform-signature-fie.title: Add New Page with AcroForm Signature Field to PDF
add-new-page-with-acroform-signature-fie.description: Demonstrates how to append a blank page to an existing PDF and place a fresh AcroForm signature field on that page using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-form-field-from-pdf.title: Delete a Form Field from a PDF
delete-form-field-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove a specific form field from a PDF document by its name using Aspose.Pdf.

flatten-pdf-remove-form-fields.title: Flatten PDF to Remove All Form Fields
flatten-pdf-remove-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flatten it to eliminate interactive form fields, and save the resulting plain, non‑interactive PDF.

set-form-field-border-color-width.title: Set Form Field Border Color and Width
set-form-field-border-color-width.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF form field's border color and thickness using Aspose.Pdf to match corporate styling guidelines.

highlight-required-form-fields.title: Highlight Required Form Fields in a PDF
highlight-required-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, mark each form field as required, change its background color to highlight it, and save the modified document.

set-font-size-style-pdf-text-field.title: Set Font Size and Style for PDF Text Field
set-font-size-style-pdf-text-field.description: Shows how to modify the font size, color, and style of a PDF form text field using Aspose.Pdf by setting global font limits and applying a DefaultAppearance.

set-pdf-form-field-read-only.title: Set PDF Form Field to Read‑Only
set-pdf-form-field-read-only.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate a specific form field, mark it as read‑only, and save the modified document.

mark-pdf-form-field-as-required.title: Mark PDF Form Field as Required
mark-pdf-form-field-as-required.description: Shows how to set the Required property of a PDF form field using Aspose.Pdf, creating the field if it does not already exist.

add-tooltip-to-pdf-form-text-box.title: Add Tooltip to PDF Form Text Box
add-tooltip-to-pdf-form-text-box.description: Shows how to create a PDF document with a text box form field and set a tooltip (alternate name) that guides the user on the expected input format using Aspose.Pdf.

set-default-value-for-pdf-form-field.title: Set Default Value for PDF Form Field
set-default-value-for-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to add a text box form field to a PDF and define its default value that appears when the document is opened.

preserve-original-pdf-save-modified-copy.title: Save Modified PDF to a New File While Preserving Original
preserve-original-pdf-save-modified-copy.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, adding a text annotation, and saving the modified document to a new file so the original remains unchanged.

incrementally-update-pdf-form-field.title: Incrementally Update PDF Form Field
incrementally-update-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates copying a PDF, modifying a form field, and saving the document with incremental updates to retain previous revisions.

batch-fill-pdf-form-fields.title: Batch Fill PDF Form Fields
batch-fill-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over a folder of PDF files and populate the same set of form fields with identical values using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-import-xml-data-into-pdfs.title: Batch Import XML Data into Multiple PDFs
batch-import-xml-data-into-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over a directory of PDF files, bind matching XML XFA form data to each PDF, and save the filled PDFs to an output folder.

batch-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Batch Export PDF Form Data to XML
batch-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Iterates over PDF files in a directory, loads each with Aspose.Pdf, and saves the form data as an XML file using XmlSaveOptions.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv.title: Export PDF Form Fields to CSV via JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv.description: Shows how to export PDF form fields to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf and then convert that JSON into a CSV file for easy spreadsheet import.

validate-required-pdf-form-fields.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields Before Saving
validate-required-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF's form fields using Aspose.Pdf, check that all fields marked as required are filled, and save the document only when validation succeeds.

create-acroform-textbox-absolute-coordin.title: Create AcroForm TextBox with Absolute Coordinates
create-acroform-textbox-absolute-coordin.description: Shows how to add a text box AcroForm field to a PDF document and position it precisely using absolute coordinates via a rectangle, including border styling and appearance settings.

create-pdf-acroform-relative-positioning.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Fields Using Relative Positioning
create-pdf-acroform-relative-positioning.description: The example creates a PDF document, sets page margins, and adds AcroForm fields—a text box and a radio button group—positioned relative to those margins.

create-populate-xfa-form-pdf.title: Create and Populate XFA Form in PDF
create-populate-xfa-form-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF containing an XFA form, optionally enabling XFA processing, populating the form fields with XML data, and saving the updated document.

extract-xfa-form-data-to-xml.title: Extract XFA Form Data from PDF to XML
extract-xfa-form-data-to-xml.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF containing an XFA form with Aspose.Pdf, accessing the XFA data package as an XmlDocument, and saving it to an XML file.

import-xfa-data-from-xml-into-pdf.title: Import XFA Form Data from XML into PDF
import-xfa-data-from-xml-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading XML XFA data and assigning it to a PDF that contains an XFA form using Aspose.Pdf, then saving the filled PDF.

merge-pdfs-unique-acroform-fields.title: Merge PDFs while Renaming AcroForm Fields
merge-pdfs-unique-acroform-fields.description: Demonstrates how to merge two PDF documents that contain AcroForm fields, renaming the fields in the source document to keep names unique and avoid conflicts.

flatten-pdf-form-fields.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields
flatten-pdf-form-fields.description: Loads a PDF, optionally fills form fields, flattens them so they become part of the page content and non‑editable, then saves the result.

restore-editable-form-fields-from-flatte.title: Restore Editable Form Fields from a Flattened PDF
restore-editable-form-fields-from-flatte.description: Demonstrates how to detect a flattened PDF and restore the original editable form fields by reloading the backup document.

rotate-form-field-label-45-degrees.title: Rotate Form Field Label by 45 Degrees
rotate-form-field-label-45-degrees.description: Shows how to rotate a PDF form field's label to a 45‑degree angle using Aspose.Pdf.

hide-pdf-form-field.title: Hide a PDF Form Field Using Aspose.Pdf
hide-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to hide a specific form field in a PDF by setting the Hidden annotation flag on its widget and saving the document.

create-visible-non-printable-form-field.title: Create Visible but Non-Printable Form Field
create-visible-non-printable-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to add a text box form field to a PDF, make it visible on screen, and configure it so it does not print.

import-xml-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import XML Form Data into PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
import-xml-form-data-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to import XFA form data from an XML string directly into a PDF document and save the updated file using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-data-to-pretty-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to Pretty-Printed JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-pretty-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF (creating a sample one if missing) and export all form fields to an indented JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-form-data-from-compressed-json.title: Import Form Data from GZIP‑Compressed JSON into PDF
import-form-data-from-compressed-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF, decompress a GZIP JSON payload on the fly, import the form field values using Form.ImportFromJson, and save the updated document.

multi-page-pdf-form-fields.title: Create Multi‑Page PDF with Distinct AcroForm Fields
multi-page-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with multiple pages and add different AcroForm fields (textbox, checkbox, combobox) to each page using Aspose.Pdf.

copy-form-field-to-another-page.title: Copy Form Field to Another Page in PDF
copy-form-field-to-another-page.description: Shows how to duplicate an existing form field and place the copy on a different page of the same PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

rename-pdf-form-field.title: Rename PDF Form Field Programmatically
rename-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a form field, rename its Name, PartialName, and MappingName properties, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

clone-pdf-form-field-to-another-page.title: Clone PDF Form Field to Another Page
clone-pdf-form-field-to-another-page.description: Loads a PDF, clones an existing form field onto a different page, modifies its properties and position, and saves the updated document.

add-javascript-onlostfocus-action-to-pdf.title: Add JavaScript OnLostFocus Action to PDF Form Field
add-javascript-onlostfocus-action-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF form with a quantity field and a read‑only total field, and assign a JavaScript action that calculates the total when the quantity field loses focus.

add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add Submit Button to PDF Form
add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to create a push button in a PDF that posts all form field data to a specified URL using Aspose.Pdf.

add-reset-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add Reset Button to PDF Form
add-reset-button-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to add a reset button to an existing PDF form using Aspose.Pdf, which clears all user‑entered data and restores default values via JavaScript.

define-calculation-order-pdf-form-fields.title: Define Calculation Order for PDF Form Fields
define-calculation-order-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates creating numeric input fields and a read‑only total field in a PDF, assigning JavaScript for the calculation, and setting the calculation order so the total updates automatically when inputs change.

add-numeric-validation-to-pdf-form-field.title: Add Numeric Validation to PDF Form Field
add-numeric-validation-to-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to create a NumberField in a PDF and attach JavaScript validation to enforce a numeric range.

list-pdf-form-field-names.title: List All PDF Form Field Names
list-pdf-form-field-names.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm and XFA form, and enumerate all field names present in the document.

filter-pdf-form-fields-by-type.title: Filter PDF Form Fields by Type Using LINQ
filter-pdf-form-fields-by-type.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its form collection, and use LINQ to retrieve only specific field types such as text boxes and list boxes.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v2.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON Schema
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v2.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf, configure JSON export options, and export all form fields to a JSON schema file.

import-acroform-fields-from-json.title: Import AcroForm Fields from JSON into a PDF
import-acroform-fields-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to deserialize a JSON schema and import AcroForm fields into a newly created PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

fill-pdf-form-and-encrypt.title: Fill PDF Form Fields and Apply AES-256 Encryption
fill-pdf-form-and-encrypt.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, populating its form fields, and encrypting the document with user and owner passwords using AES‑256 encryption.

apply-digital-signature-to-pdf-form.title: Apply Digital Signature to PDF with Form Fields
apply-digital-signature-to-pdf-form.description: Loads a PDF containing filled form fields, adds a visible signature field, and digitally signs the document using a PKCS#7 certificate.

set-pdf-metadata-after-form-processing.title: Set PDF Metadata After Form Processing
set-pdf-metadata-after-form-processing.description: Loads a PDF, optionally updates a form field, then sets standard document metadata such as author, title, subject, and keywords before saving the file.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-byte-array.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from Byte Array
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-byte-array.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, assigns values to specified form fields, and returns the modified PDF as a byte array.

async-import-xml-form-data-into-pdf.title: Asynchronously Import XML Form Data into PDF
async-import-xml-form-data-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading XML form data into a PDF document and saving it asynchronously to avoid blocking the main thread.

parallel-fill-multiple-pdf-forms.title: Parallel Fill Multiple PDF Forms
parallel-fill-multiple-pdf-forms.description: Shows how to use Parallel.ForEach to load, populate, and save several PDF documents at the same time by setting form field values with Aspose.Pdf.

log-pdf-form-modifications-add-field.title: Log PDF Form Field Modifications and Add New TextBox
log-pdf-form-modifications-add-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate over its form fields, modify each field's value, add a new TextBox field, and record every change to a log file for audit and troubleshooting.

generate-csv-summary-of-filled-pdf-form-.title: Generate CSV Summary of Filled PDF Form Fields
generate-csv-summary-of-filled-pdf-form-.description: The example scans a folder of processed PDFs, extracts each form field’s name and value, and writes a CSV report summarizing the filled fields across all documents.

compare-pdf-form-data-diff-report.title: Compare PDF Form Data and Generate Diff Report
compare-pdf-form-data-diff-report.description: Loads two PDFs, extracts their form fields with Aspose.Pdf, compares the field values, and writes a text report that highlights mismatched and missing fields.

create-pdf-template-with-placeholders.title: Create PDF Template with Placeholder Form Fields
create-pdf-template-with-placeholders.description: The example builds a PDF document, adds a centered title, and creates text box form fields that act as placeholders for later data binding. Labels are added for visual guidance and the file is saved as a reusable template.

replace-pdf-form-placeholder-with-curren.title: Replace PDF Form Placeholder with Current Date
replace-pdf-form-placeholder-with-curren.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a specific form field, and set its contents to the current system date using Aspose.Pdf's PageDate formatting.

create-multi-select-listbox-pdf.title: Create a Multi-Select List Box in a PDF Form
create-multi-select-listbox-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a list box form field with multi-selection enabled, populate its options, and pre-select multiple items using Aspose.Pdf.

populate-combobox-from-datatable.title: Populate ComboBox Field from DataTable
populate-combobox-from-datatable.description: Demonstrates how to fill an Aspose.Pdf combo box form field with options retrieved from a database (simulated by a DataTable) and save the PDF.

add-signature-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add Signature Field to PDF Form
add-signature-field-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, create a signature form field, and save the modified document.

extract-signature-appearance-image.title: Extract Signature Field Appearance as Image
extract-signature-appearance-image.description: Loads a PDF, finds the first signature form field, extracts its visual appearance as an image, and saves it for audit logging.

set-max-length-pdf-textbox-field.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Text Box Form Field
set-max-length-pdf-textbox-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate a text box form field, set its MaxLen property to restrict user input, and save the modified document.

enable-spell-check-textbox-field.title: Enable Spell Check for a PDF Text Box Field
enable-spell-check-textbox-field.description: Shows how to create a PDF document with a text box form field and enable spell checking using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml__v2.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml__v2.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and exporting its form fields to an XML file for offline data collection.

validate-xml-xsd-populate-pdf-xfa.title: Validate XML against XSD and Populate PDF XFA Form
validate-xml-xsd-populate-pdf-xfa.description: Demonstrates how to validate an XML file against an XSD schema and, when valid, import the data into an XFA PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

transform-xml-fill-pdf-form-fields.title: Transform XML with XSLT and Fill PDF Form Fields
transform-xml-fill-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load an XML file, apply an XSLT transformation, and use the transformed data to populate fields in an Aspose.Pdf form.

create-order-form-with-auto-calc.title: Create PDF Order Form with Auto‑Calculating Total
create-order-form-with-auto-calc.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF containing AcroForm fields for quantity, unit price, and total, and embed JavaScript that automatically calculates the total amount when the other fields change.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv__v2.title: Export PDF Form Fields to CSV
export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv__v2.description: Shows how to read form fields from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and write their properties to a CSV file for external analysis.

add-hidden-session-id-field-to-pdf.title: Add Hidden Session ID Field to PDF
add-hidden-session-id-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a hidden text box form field into an existing PDF to store a session identifier for backend tracking.

set-default-appearance-textbox-field.title: Set Default Appearance for a PDF Text Box Field
set-default-appearance-textbox-field.description: Demonstrates how to create a text box form field and set its default appearance (font, size, and color) using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Form Data to XFDF and Stream to HTTP Response
export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, export its form/annotation data to XFDF XML, and stream the result directly to an HTTP response for immediate download.

import-xml-form-data-into-pdf__v2.title: Import XML Form Data from Network Stream into PDF
import-xml-form-data-into-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to download XML form data over HTTP, load it into an XmlDocument, and import it into an XFA PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

bulk-fill-pdf-form-from-json-skip-missin.title: Bulk Fill PDF Form Fields from JSON with Missing Field Skipping
bulk-fill-pdf-form-from-json-skip-missin.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, iterating over its form fields, and importing values from a JSON file while gracefully skipping fields that are not present in the JSON.

set-pdf-metadata-with-fallback-defaults.title: Set PDF Metadata with Fallback Defaults
set-pdf-metadata-with-fallback-defaults.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, check for missing metadata fields, and assign default values before saving the document.

set-dashed-border-on-pdf-form-field.title: Set Dashed Border on PDF Form TextBox Field
set-dashed-border-on-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a TextBox form field, and apply a dashed border style using Aspose.Pdf.

set-form-field-border-style-beveled.title: Set Form Field Border Style to Beveled
set-form-field-border-style-beveled.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF form field's border to a beveled style using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

apply-background-image-to-pdf-form-field.title: Apply Background Image to PDF Form Field
apply-background-image-to-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to set a background image on a specific XFA form field in a PDF using Aspose.PDF and then save the updated document.

export-pdf-form-data-to-indented-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to Indented JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-indented-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF, export its form fields to a JSON file, and enable indentation for better readability using Aspose.Pdf.

import-form-data-from-json.title: Import Form Data from JSON via REST API
import-form-data-from-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF template, retrieve JSON form data from a REST API, import the data into the PDF form using ImportFromJson, and save the populated PDF.

create-rtl-textbox-form-field.title: Create RTL TextBox Form Field in PDF
create-rtl-textbox-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to add a TextBox form field configured for right‑to‑left languages, setting alignment, font, appearance, and border, then save the PDF.

center-align-textbox-field.title: Center Align TextBox Field in PDF Form
center-align-textbox-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a TextBoxField, set its horizontal and vertical alignment to center, and save the updated document.

right-align-number-form-field.title: Right-align Number Form Field in PDF
right-align-number-form-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, retrieve a NumberField form field, and set its text alignment to right using Aspose.Pdf.

add-date-picker-field-to-pdf.title: Add Date Picker Field to PDF
add-date-picker-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a date picker form field into a PDF and attach JavaScript to open the calendar selector when the field is activated.

create-formatted-currency-field.title: Create a Formatted Currency Field in a PDF
create-formatted-currency-field.description: Shows how to add a RichTextBox form field to a PDF document and set its FormattedValue to a currency string that includes a symbol and thousand separators.

validate-email-field-before-saving-pdf.title: Validate Email Field Before Saving PDF
validate-email-field-before-saving-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, checks that the "email" text box contains an '@' character, and saves the document only if the validation succeeds.

remove-specific-form-field-from-pdf.title: Remove a Specific Form Field from a PDF
remove-specific-form-field-from-pdf.description: Shows how to locate a form field by its name and delete it from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Form.Delete method.

insert-form-field-at-index.title: Insert Form Field at Specific Index in PDF
insert-form-field-at-index.description: Shows how to add a new TextBox form field to a PDF and place it at a specific index in the Document.Form collection to control its layout order.

create-pdf-with-acroform-open-js.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Text Field and Open-Document JavaScript
create-pdf-with-acroform-open-js.description: Demonstrates how to add an AcroForm text box to a PDF and assign a document-level JavaScript action that runs when the file is opened.

export-pdf-form-data-to-compressed-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to Compressed JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-compressed-json.description: Demonstrates exporting all form fields from a PDF to JSON and compressing the output with GZip for efficient storage or transmission.

import-encrypted-xml-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import Encrypted XML Form Data into PDF
import-encrypted-xml-form-data-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to decrypt an encrypted XML file and bind its form data to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, then save the filled PDF.

add-rich-text-field-with-html.title: Add Rich Text Field with HTML Formatting to PDF
add-rich-text-field-with-html.description: Demonstrates creating a RichTextBoxField, setting its FormattedValue with HTML markup, and adding the field to a PDF form.

create-pdf-with-acroform-tooltips.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Fields and Tooltips
create-pdf-with-acroform-tooltips.description: Shows how to add text box AcroForm fields to a PDF document and assign tooltips (alternate names) using Aspose.Pdf.

import-form-data-from-json__v2.title: Import Form Data from JSON into PDF
import-form-data-from-json__v2.description: Shows how to bulk import form field values from a JSON file into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's ImportFromJson method and then save the updated document.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-custom-root.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML with Custom Root
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-custom-root.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts all form fields, and writes them to an XML file using a custom root element name required by an external system.

add-calculated-total-field-javascript.title: Add Calculated Total Field Using JavaScript
add-calculated-total-field-javascript.description: Demonstrates how to create numeric form fields in a PDF and add a calculated field that sums them using JavaScript, with automatic recalculation enabled.

add-current-time-field-to-pdf.title: Add Current Time Field to PDF on Load
add-current-time-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a DateField in a PDF, set its display format to HH:mm:ss, assign the current system time as the default value, and save the modified document.

create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field.title: Create PDF Form with Barcode Field
create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field.description: Shows how to add a barcode form field to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and save the resulting form.

create-dynamic-barcode-field.title: Create Dynamic Barcode Field in PDF
create-dynamic-barcode-field.description: Shows how to generate a unique barcode value at runtime and add it as a read‑only BarcodeField to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

verify-pdf-form-field-count.title: Verify PDF Form Field Count Before Processing
verify-pdf-form-field-count.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, check the number of form fields using Document.Form.Count, and only process the document when the expected field count is present.

create-pdf-with-acroform-textbox-and-mar.title: Create PDF with AcroForm TextBox and Page Margins
create-pdf-with-acroform-textbox-and-mar.description: Demonstrates how to set page margins and add an AcroForm text box field to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-form-field-value.title: Set PDF Form Field Value Using Aspose.Pdf
set-pdf-form-field-value.description: Loads a PDF, finds a form field by name, updates its value (including text boxes, checkboxes, and radio buttons), and saves the modified document.

set-max-length-for-pdf-form-text-field.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Form Text Field
set-max-length-for-pdf-form-text-field.description: Demonstrates how to limit a PDF form text box to a specific number of characters using Aspose.Pdf's TextBoxField.MaxLen property.

get-address-field-character-limit.title: Get Character Limit of a PDF TextBox Form Field
get-address-field-character-limit.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a text box form field named "Address", and retrieve its maximum character limit using the MaxLen property.

delete-form-field-from-pdf__v2.title: Delete a Form Field from PDF
delete-form-field-from-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to remove a specific form field ("OldPhoneNumber") from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and save the updated file.

remove-typewriter-forms-from-page.title: Remove Typewriter Form XObjects from a Specific PDF Page
remove-typewriter-forms-from-page.description: Demonstrates how to locate and delete Typewriter form XObjects (Subtype "Form") on page three of a PDF using TextFragmentAbsorber.

clear-page5-form-fields.title: Delete Form Fields on Page Five
clear-page5-form-fields.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF's form fields, find those located on page 5, and delete them to clear that page using Aspose.Pdf.

export-acroform-data-to-xml.title: Export AcroForm Data to XML (XFDF)
export-acroform-data-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF document and exports all AcroForm (interactive form) data to an XML‑based XFDF file named 'formdata.xml'. Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's Document class for data extraction.

import-acroform-data-from-xfdf-xml.title: Import AcroForm Data from XFDF XML into PDF
import-acroform-data-from-xfdf-xml.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with AcroForm fields, reading XFDF‑style XML data, importing the field values using XfdfReader, and saving the filled PDF.

create-pdf-submit-button.title: Create a PDF Submit Button that Posts to a URL
create-pdf-submit-button.description: Demonstrates how to add a push‑button form field to an existing PDF and attach a SubmitFormAction that posts the form data to a specified web endpoint.

validate-maxlen-truncation-pdf-textbox.title: Validate MaxLen Truncation in PDF TextBox Field
validate-maxlen-truncation-pdf-textbox.description: Demonstrates how setting MaxLen on a TextBoxField limits input to 50 characters, causing excess characters to be truncated when the PDF is saved and reloaded.

apply-custom-font-to-pdf-form-fields.title: Apply Custom Font to All PDF Form Fields
apply-custom-font-to-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a font, create a DefaultAppearance, and assign it to every form field so the custom font is applied and embedded.

set-comments-field-max-length.title: Set Maximum Length for Comments Field in PDFs
set-comments-field-max-length.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑process PDF files, locate a TextBox field named 'Comments', and restrict its input to 100 characters using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-csv-report-pdf-form-fields.title: Generate CSV Report of PDF Form Fields
generate-csv-report-pdf-form-fields.description: Loads one or more PDF files, iterates through their form fields, and creates a CSV report listing each field's name, type, and character limit.

update-pdf-form-fields.title: Update PDF Form Fields Using Aspose.Pdf
update-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to modify text, checkbox, and radio‑button fields in a PDF form with Aspose.Pdf without using the high‑level Facade API.

export-acroform-data-to-xfdf.title: Export AcroForm Data to XFDF on Network Share
export-acroform-data-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF containing AcroForm fields and exporting the form data to an XFDF (XML) file saved to a UNC network share.

synchronize-form-data-across-multiple-pd.title: Synchronize Form Data Across Multiple PDFs Using XML
synchronize-form-data-across-multiple-pd.description: Demonstrates loading several PDF documents, binding the same XML form data to each, and saving the synchronized PDFs in parallel.

flatten-first-page-remove-form-fields.title: Flatten First Page to Remove Form Fields
flatten-first-page-remove-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flatten the first page to delete all form fields, and save the cleaned page as a template.

add-payment-method-radio-button-group.title: Add PaymentMethod Radio Button Group to PDF
add-payment-method-radio-button-group.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF form with a radio button group named 'PaymentMethod' containing 'Credit' and 'Debit' options using Aspose.Pdf.

set-default-radio-button-value.title: Set Default Selected Radio Button Value in PDF Form
set-default-radio-button-value.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically set the default selected option of a radio button field in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf. The example loads a PDF, updates the 'PaymentMethod' radio group to 'Credit', and saves the result.

add-multiline-feedback-textbox.title: Add Multiline Feedback TextBox to PDF
add-multiline-feedback-textbox.description: Shows how to insert a multiline TextBox form field named 'Feedback' with a 500‑character limit into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-signature-form-fields.title: Remove Signature Form Fields from PDF
remove-signature-form-fields.description: Shows how to iterate over a PDF's form collection, identify fields of type SignatureField, and delete them using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv__v3.title: Export PDF Form Fields to CSV
export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv__v3.description: Loads a PDF document, reads all form fields and their current values, and writes them to a CSV file for external processing.

import-csv-data-into-pdf-form-fields.title: Import CSV Data into PDF Form Fields
import-csv-data-into-pdf-form-fields.description: The example reads a CSV file, maps column headers to values, and fills matching fields in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf. It demonstrates loading a PDF, disabling auto‑recalculation, setting field values, and saving the result.

add-hidden-creation-timestamp-field-to-p.title: Add Hidden Creation Timestamp Field to PDF
add-hidden-creation-timestamp-field-to-p.description: Demonstrates how to insert a hidden, read‑only text box form field containing the document's creation timestamp into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-employeeid-field-readonly.title: Set EmployeeID Form Field to Read‑Only in PDF
set-employeeid-field-readonly.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate the 'EmployeeID' form field, mark it as read‑only to prevent user edits, and save the updated document.

flatten-pdf-form-fields__v2.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields to Static Content
flatten-pdf-form-fields__v2.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flattening all interactive form fields so they become static, and saving the resulting document.

copy-form-fields-to-another-pdf.title: Copy Form Fields from One PDF to Another
copy-form-fields-to-another-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading two PDFs, cloning the form fields from a source document, adding them to a destination document, and saving the merged result.

create-country-dropdown-list.title: Create Country Dropdown List in PDF Form
create-country-dropdown-list.description: Demonstrates how to add a ComboBox (dropdown) field named 'Country' to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and populate it with a predefined list of country names.

set-default-country-combo-box.title: Set Default Selected Country in PDF Combo Box
set-default-country-combo-box.description: Shows how to set the default selected item of the 'Country' combo box in a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf Forms API.

validate-numeric-textboxfield-input.title: Validate Numeric TextBoxField Input in PDF
validate-numeric-textboxfield-input.description: Creates a PDF with a TextBoxField intended for numeric input and demonstrates programmatic validation that rejects alphabetic characters by throwing an exception.

add-javascript-calculation-button-to-pdf.title: Add JavaScript Calculation Button to PDF Form
add-javascript-calculation-button-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a push‑button into a PDF form and attach JavaScript that calculates a total price from Quantity and UnitPrice fields.

remove-javascript-actions-from-pdf-form-.title: Remove JavaScript Actions from PDF Form Fields
remove-javascript-actions-from-pdf-form-.description: Shows how to iterate through all form fields in a PDF and clear any attached JavaScript actions, securing the document before distribution.

export-pdf-form-field-appearances.title: Export PDF Form Field Appearances to JSON Files
export-pdf-form-field-appearances.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its form fields, and exports each field's definition and appearance streams to separate JSON files for visual inspection.

add-custom-image-to-pdf-button.title: Add Custom Image Appearance to PDF Button Field
add-custom-image-to-pdf-button.description: Demonstrates how to import an image file and set it as the appearance stream of a button field in a PDF form, using both the core ButtonField API and the XFA API.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-xml-form-data.title: Batch Convert PDFs to XML Form Data
batch-convert-pdfs-to-xml-form-data.description: Shows how to iterate over a directory of PDF files and convert each PDF to an XML form data file using Aspose.Pdf's Document and XmlSaveOptions, keeping the original file names.

synchronize-form-data-between-pdfs.title: Synchronize Form Data Between PDFs Using XFDF
synchronize-form-data-between-pdfs.description: Exports form field values from a source PDF to an XFDF file and imports them into a target PDF, creating a filled copy of the target document.

replace-xfa-with-acroform.title: Replace XFA Form with AcroForm Using an XML Template
replace-xfa-with-acroform.description: Demonstrates how to detect an XFA form in a PDF, import field definitions from an XML template, create corresponding AcroForm fields, and save the document as a standard AcroForm PDF.

set-tooltip-email-form-field.title: Set Tooltip for Email Form Field in PDF
set-tooltip-email-form-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate the 'Email' form field, assign a tooltip via the AlternateName property, and save the modified document.

set-red-border-color-for-pdf-text-fields.title: Set Red Border Color for PDF Text Fields
set-red-border-color-for-pdf-text-fields.description: Shows how to loop through PDF form fields and change a text box's border (via the field's Color property) to red, highlighting mandatory information using Aspose.Pdf.

add-signature-field-with-image-stamp.title: Add Signature Field with Image Stamp to PDF
add-signature-field-with-image-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to create a signature form field named 'ClientSignature' in an existing PDF and set its visual appearance using a predefined image stamp.

sign-and-lock-pdf-signature-field.title: Sign and Lock a PDF Signature Field
sign-and-lock-pdf-signature-field.description: Shows how to apply a PKCS#7 digital signature to a PDF signature field and then set the field to read‑only so it cannot be altered during review.

hidden-calculation-field-with-javascript.title: Create Hidden Calculation Field with JavaScript in PDF
hidden-calculation-field-with-javascript.description: Demonstrates adding a hidden numeric field to a PDF that automatically calculates the sum of two other fields using JavaScript.

export-selected-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.title: Export Selected PDF Form Fields to XML
export-selected-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts the values of specified form fields, and writes those values to an XML file.

import-xml-update-pdf-form-fields.title: Import XML Subset and Update PDF Form Fields
import-xml-update-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF form, read an XML file containing a subset of field values, update matching PDF form fields, and save the filled PDF.

add-date-field-with-validation.title: Add Date Field with MM/DD/YYYY Validation
add-date-field-with-validation.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a DateField, set its display format, and attach a JavaScript OnValidate action that enforces the MM/DD/YYYY pattern using a regular expression.

set-max-length-pdf-password-field.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Password Field
set-max-length-pdf-password-field.description: Shows how to add a text box form field to a PDF and enforce a maximum input length of 20 characters using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-form-template-fill-from-json.title: Create PDF Form Template and Fill from JSON
create-pdf-form-template-fill-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF form with placeholder fields using Aspose.Pdf and then populate those fields from a JSON data source.

batch-fill-pdf-forms-from-csv.title: Batch Fill PDF Form Templates from CSV Data
batch-fill-pdf-forms-from-csv.description: Shows how to read CSV rows into a DataTable, map each column to matching PDF form fields, fill the template for each record, and save the resulting PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.

handle-missing-xml-import-for-pdf-form.title: Import XML Data into PDF Form with Missing File Handling
handle-missing-xml-import-for-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to safely import XML data into an XFA PDF form using Aspose.Pdf while handling the case where the XML file is missing, preventing runtime exceptions.

toggle-pdf-form-field-visibility.title: Toggle PDF Form Field Visibility with JavaScript
toggle-pdf-form-field-visibility.description: Shows how to attach JavaScript to a checkbox field to hide or show another form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v3.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON Schema
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v3.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configure JSON export options, and export all form field definitions to a JSON file for use with external form builders.

import-acroform-fields-from-json__v2.title: Import AcroForm Fields from JSON into PDF
import-acroform-fields-from-json__v2.description: Shows how to load a JSON schema that defines AcroForm fields and import them into a newly created PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-checkbox-default-checked.title: Set Checkbox Default State to Checked in PDF
set-checkbox-default-checked.description: Demonstrates how to create a checkbox form field in a PDF and set its default value to checked programmatically using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-submit-button-post.title: Create PDF Submit Button with HTTP POST (URL‑encoded)
create-pdf-submit-button-post.description: Demonstrates adding a push button to a PDF that submits form data via HTTP POST in URL‑encoded format using Aspose.Pdf.

test-submit-form-action-returns-200-ok.title: Test SubmitFormAction Returns 200 OK
test-submit-form-action-returns-200-ok.description: Shows how to create a PDF with a submit button using Aspose.Pdf and verify via a unit test that the configured submit URL responds with HTTP 200 using a simulated POST request.

add-reset-button-to-pdf-form__v2.title: Add Reset Button to PDF Form
add-reset-button-to-pdf-form__v2.description: Shows how to insert a reset button into an existing PDF form that clears all user‑entered data using JavaScript.

set-export-value-for-pdf-radio-button.title: Set Export Value for PDF Radio Button Option
set-export-value-for-pdf-radio-button.description: Shows how to add or update a radio button option in a PDF form and assign a custom export value using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-hidden-guid-tracking-fie.title: Create PDF with Hidden GUID Tracking Field
create-pdf-with-hidden-guid-tracking-fie.description: Demonstrates generating a GUID at runtime and storing it in a hidden textbox form field inside a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

transform-pdf-form-data-schema.title: Transform PDF Form Data Between JSON Schemas
transform-pdf-form-data-schema.description: The example extracts form fields from a source PDF to JSON, renames the fields, and imports the transformed data into another PDF, creating sample PDFs if they are missing.

set-pdf-form-open-zoom-level.title: Set PDF Form Open Zoom Level
set-pdf-form-open-zoom-level.description: Shows how to bind a PDF to FormEditor and configure the document's OpenAction with a GoToAction and XYZExplicitDestination to define the initial zoom when the form is opened.

add-tooltip-to-pdf-submit-button.title: Add Tooltip to PDF Submit Button
add-tooltip-to-pdf-submit-button.description: Shows how to create a push button on a PDF page and assign a tooltip (using the AlternateName property) with Aspose.Pdf.

lock-pdf-form-fields.title: Lock PDF Form Fields (Read‑Only) with Aspose.Pdf
lock-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to set each form field in a PDF to read‑only using Aspose.Pdf and then save the locked document.

create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field__v2.title: Create PDF Form with Barcode Field
create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field__v2.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document, add a read‑only barcode field using Aspose.Pdf, and save the form to a file.

set-file-size-limit-for-pdf-attachments.title: Set File Size Limit for PDF Attachment Fields
set-file-size-limit-for-pdf-attachments.description: Demonstrates how to restrict the maximum file size for attachment fields to 2 MB by configuring Aspose.Pdf's global file‑size limit before loading and saving a PDF document.

export-pdf-form-field-metadata-to-csv.title: Export PDF Form Field Metadata to CSV
export-pdf-form-field-metadata-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates over its form fields, extracts properties like name, type, default value, read‑only and required flags, and writes the information to a CSV file for auditing.

import-form-fields-from-csv.title: Import Form Fields from CSV into PDF
import-form-fields-from-csv.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, reading field definitions from a CSV file, creating corresponding form fields, and saving the updated document.

add-date-picker-field-to-pdf__v2.title: Add Date Picker Field with Current Date to PDF
add-date-picker-field-to-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to insert a DateField into an existing PDF and set its default value to the current system date when the document is opened.

validate-date-field-before-2000.title: Validate Date Field to Disallow Dates Before 2000
validate-date-field-before-2000.description: Demonstrates adding a DateField to a PDF and attaching JavaScript that prevents users from entering dates earlier than January 1, 2000.

create-dynamic-list-box-pdf-form.title: Create a Dynamic List Box in a PDF Form
create-dynamic-list-box-pdf-form.description: Shows how to add a ListBox field to a PDF document, populate it with items, enable multi‑selection, and save the form using Aspose.Pdf.

set-text-field-background-color-light-gr.title: Set Text Field Background Color to Light Gray
set-text-field-background-color-light-gr.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a text box form field, and change its background (fill) color to light gray using Aspose.Pdf.

duplicate-rename-pdf-form-field.title: Duplicate and Rename PDF Form Field
duplicate-rename-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically copy an existing form field, assign new names, reposition each copy, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-email-validation-to-pdf-f.title: Add JavaScript Email Validation to PDF Form Field
add-javascript-email-validation-to-pdf-f.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF form field using Aspose.Pdf to ensure the entered email contains an '@' character.

create-pdf-tax-calculation-form.title: Create PDF Tax Calculation Form
create-pdf-tax-calculation-form.description: Shows how to build a PDF form with Subtotal, Tax Rate, and a calculated Tax Amount field using Aspose.Pdf, and attach JavaScript to automatically compute the tax.

export-tax-value-to-xml.title: Export Calculated Tax Value to XML from PDF Form
export-tax-value-to-xml.description: Demonstrates extracting a calculated tax field value from a submitted PDF form and saving it as a custom XML file, with optional export of the full PDF model to XML.

import-tax-rate-xml-pdf.title: Import Tax Rate from XML into PDF Hidden Form Field
import-tax-rate-xml-pdf.description: Shows how to read a tax rate from an XML file and populate a hidden form field in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-noexport-flag-on-sensitive-pdf-form-.title: Set NoExport Flag on Sensitive PDF Form Fields
set-noexport-flag-on-sensitive-pdf-form-.description: Shows how to mark specific PDF form fields as non‑exportable (NoExport) using Aspose.Pdf, preventing sensitive data like SSN or credit card numbers from being included in exported data.

pdf-form-language-labels.title: Create PDF Form with Language‑Dependent Labels
pdf-form-language-labels.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF form containing a language selection combo box and use JavaScript to change a label field's text dynamically based on the selected language.

batch-apply-custom-font-to-pdfs.title: Batch Apply Custom Font to PDFs
batch-apply-custom-font-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over PDF files in a network folder, load a custom TrueType font with fallback handling, replace the font of all text fragments using Aspose.Pdf, and save the updated documents to a resolved output folder.

highlight-required-pdf-form-field.title: Highlight Required PDF Form Field with Red Border
highlight-required-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to mark a PDF form field as required and visually highlight it with a red border using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-form-with-qr-code-field.title: Create PDF Form with QR Code Field
create-pdf-form-with-qr-code-field.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF form that includes a text box for user input and a QR code barcode field using Aspose.Pdf.

auto-update-qr-code-from-text-field.title: Auto‑Update QR Code Field from Text Field in PDF
auto-update-qr-code-from-text-field.description: Shows how to attach JavaScript to a PDF text field so that a QR code barcode field updates automatically when the text changes, using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-xslt.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML and Transform with XSLT
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-xslt.description: The example loads a PDF containing form fields, exports the form data to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf, and then applies an XSLT stylesheet to generate a custom HTML report.

import-xml-data-into-pdf-form.title: Import XML Data into PDF Form Fields
import-xml-data-into-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load a PDF, assign XFA data from an XML file to repopulate its form fields, and save the updated document.

create-pdf-multi-select-listbox.title: Create PDF with Multi‑Select List Box
create-pdf-multi-select-listbox.description: Demonstrates how to add a list box form field that allows multiple selections to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

list-box-three-selection-limit.title: Create Multi-Select List Box with Three Pre-Selected Items
list-box-three-selection-limit.description: Demonstrates how to add a multi-select list box to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, populate it with options, and pre-select three items to illustrate a three-item selection limit.

add-hidden-ip-field-to-pdf.title: Add Hidden IP Address Field to PDF with JavaScript
add-hidden-ip-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a hidden text box field to a PDF and populate it with the user's IP address using JavaScript that runs when the document is opened.

add-ipv4-validation-to-pdf-textbox.title: Add IPv4 Validation to PDF Text Box Field
add-ipv4-validation-to-pdf-textbox.description: Creates a PDF with a text box form field for an IPv4 address and attaches JavaScript that validates the input using a regular expression, rejecting invalid formats.

create-pdf-form-digital-signature.title: Create PDF Form with Digital Signature and Certificate Validation
create-pdf-form-digital-signature.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field to a PDF form, sign it with a PFX certificate, and verify the signature both in‑memory and after saving the file.

required-signature-field-lock-pdf.title: Create Required Signature Field and Lock PDF After Signing
required-signature-field-lock-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a required digital signature field to a PDF, sign it with a PKCS#7 certificate, and lock the document to prevent further changes.

export-pdf-signature-details-to-xml.title: Export PDF Signature Details to XML Audit Log
export-pdf-signature-details-to-xml.description: Loads a signed PDF, extracts information from each signature field—including date, reason, algorithm details, and certificate—and writes the data to an XML file for audit purposes.

import-xml-signature-to-pdf-field.title: Import XML Signature Data and Sign PDF Field
import-xml-signature-to-pdf-field.description: Demonstrates loading digital signature details from an XML file, locating a signature field in a PDF, and applying a PKCS#7 signature using Aspose.Pdf.

create-password-protected-pdf-form.title: Create Password-Protected PDF Form
create-password-protected-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF with a text box form field and apply user/owner passwords to restrict editing while allowing viewing and printing.

set-pdf-password-field-value.title: Set Password Value for PDF Form Field
set-pdf-password-field-value.description: Loads a PDF, finds a password box form field, assigns a new password, optionally makes the field read‑only, and saves the updated document.

validate-pdf-password-protection.title: Validate Password Protection on Encrypted PDF Form Field
validate-pdf-password-protection.description: Creates an encrypted PDF containing a text box form field, then verifies that opening the file with an incorrect password throws an InvalidPasswordException while the correct password grants access to the field value.

add-auto-backup-action-to-pdf-form-field.title: Add Auto‑Backup Action to PDF Form Field
add-auto-backup-action-to-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF form field that saves a backup copy each time the field value changes, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-listener-to-pdf-form-fiel.title: Add JavaScript Listener to PDF Form Field
add-javascript-listener-to-pdf-form-fiel.description: Shows how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF form field that triggers when the field's value changes, using Aspose.Pdf.

export-form-field-appearance-to-json.title: Export Form Field Appearance Settings to JSON
export-form-field-appearance-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to export all form fields, including their appearance settings, from a PDF document to a formatted JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-form-appearance-from-json.title: Import Form Field Appearance from JSON into PDF
import-form-appearance-from-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import form field appearance settings from a JSON file using ImportFromJson, and save the updated document.

create-pdf-form-collapsible-section.title: Create PDF Form with Collapsible Section Using Checkbox
create-pdf-form-collapsible-section.description: Demonstrates adding a checkbox to a PDF form and using JavaScript to show or hide a collapsible text field based on the checkbox state.

create-collapsible-section-pdf-collapsed.title: Create Collapsible Section in PDF (Initially Collapsed)
create-collapsible-section-pdf-collapsed.description: Demonstrates how to add a TextAnnotation as a collapsible section to a PDF and set its initial state to collapsed using the Open property.

add-calculated-total-price-field.title: Add Calculated Total Price Field to PDF Form
add-calculated-total-price-field.description: Demonstrates how to add numeric fields to a PDF form and use JavaScript to automatically calculate a total price from quantity and unit price, with auto‑recalculation enabled.

export-total-price-to-xml.title: Export Total Price to XML for Invoicing
export-total-price-to-xml.description: Calculates the sum of item prices and writes the total to an XML file representing an invoice for external integration.

generate-pdf-discounted-price-from-xml.title: Generate PDF with Discounted Price from XML
generate-pdf-discounted-price-from-xml.description: Reads discount rates from an XML file, aggregates them, applies the total discount to a base price, and writes the calculation result into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-form-pdf-only-attachment.title: Create PDF Form with PDF‑Only File Attachment Field
create-pdf-form-pdf-only-attachment.description: The example creates a PDF document containing a form with a text box field that acts as a file attachment selector, and applies JavaScript validation to allow only PDF files.

validate-pdf-file-size.title: Validate PDF File Size Before Form Submission
validate-pdf-file-size.description: Shows how to restrict an uploaded PDF to a maximum of 5 MB using Aspose.Pdf's FileSizeLimitToMemoryLoading property and handle size‑limit exceptions to block form submission.

add-progress-bar-to-pdf-form.title: Add Progress Bar to PDF Form Using Aspose.Pdf
add-progress-bar-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF form with a progress bar that updates automatically as the user checks sections, using Aspose.Pdf fields and JavaScript actions.

export-pdf-save-progress-to-xml.title: Export PDF Save Progress to XML
export-pdf-save-progress-to-xml.description: Shows how to capture Aspose.Pdf save progress events via HtmlSaveOptions.CustomProgressHandler and write them as XML entries to track form completion status.

pdf-form-language-specific-label.title: Create PDF Form with Language‑Specific Dynamic Label
pdf-form-language-specific-label.description: The example creates a PDF document containing a combo box for language selection and a text box whose label updates dynamically via JavaScript based on the chosen locale.

locale-aware-label-with-javascript.title: Add Locale-Aware Label with JavaScript to PDF
locale-aware-label-with-javascript.description: Creates a PDF containing a text box form field and embeds JavaScript that selects a label based on the viewer's language using a dictionary of translations.

batch-generate-pdf-forms.title: Batch Generate PDF Forms from a Template
batch-generate-pdf-forms.description: Shows how to load a PDF template, populate its form fields with data from a DataTable, and save an individual PDF for each database record.

add-javascript-validation-to-pdf-form-su.title: Add JavaScript Validation to PDF Form Submit Button
add-javascript-validation-to-pdf-form-su.description: Demonstrates how to add a required text field and a submit button with JavaScript that validates required fields before submitting the PDF form.

create-pdf-form-with-hidden-log.title: Create PDF Form with Hidden Interaction Log
create-pdf-form-with-hidden-log.description: Shows how to add a visible text box and a hidden log field to a PDF and use JavaScript to record when the field is activated.

export-pdf-form-interaction-log-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Form Interaction Log to XFDF (XML)
export-pdf-form-interaction-log-to-xfdf.description: Loads a PDF containing a form and exports all annotations and form field data to an XFDF file, which provides an XML representation of the interaction log.

import-interaction-log-xml-xfdf.title: Import XML Interaction Log and XFDF Annotations to Reconstruct PDF
import-interaction-log-xml-xfdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML interaction log into a PDF document, optionally importing XFDF annotations, and saving the reconstructed PDF for viewer testing.

add-auto-updating-date-time-field-to-pdf.title: Add Auto‑Updating Date/Time Field to PDF
add-auto-updating-date-time-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates inserting a DateField into a PDF and attaching JavaScript so the field displays the current date and time each time the page is opened.

create-readonly-date-field-pdf.title: Create a Read‑Only Date Field in a PDF Form
create-readonly-date-field-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a date field to a PDF, set its value and display format, and make it read‑only using Aspose.Pdf.

conditional-section-pdf-form.title: Create PDF Form with Conditional Section Using Checkbox
conditional-section-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to add a checkbox that toggles the visibility of a text field in a PDF form using JavaScript actions with Aspose.Pdf.

export-conditional-visibility-state-to-x.title: Export Conditional Visibility State of PDF Form Fields to XML
export-conditional-visibility-state-to-x.description: Shows how to toggle a widget annotation's Exportable property and save the PDF document model, including visibility settings, to an XML file to preserve user preferences across sessions.

import-annotation-visibility-from-xml.title: Import Annotation Visibility from XML and Apply to PDF
import-annotation-visibility-from-xml.description: The example reads visibility settings for PDF annotations from an XML file and updates the Hidden flag of each annotation accordingly, then saves the modified PDF.

create-pdf-form-with-concatenated-barcod.title: Create PDF Form with Concatenated Barcode Field
create-pdf-form-with-concatenated-barcod.description: Shows how to add text fields to a PDF form and generate a Code128 barcode from the concatenated values of those fields using Aspose.Pdf.

set-barcode-code128-link-source-field.title: Set Barcode Field to Code128 and Link to Source Field
set-barcode-code128-link-source-field.description: Demonstrates how to create or retrieve a barcode form field, set its format to Code128, and keep it synchronized with a text field using JavaScript in an Aspose.Pdf document.

export-pdf-barcode-values-to-xml.title: Export PDF Barcode Field Values to XML
export-pdf-barcode-values-to-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its barcode form fields, and write each field's name and value to an XML file for inventory system integration.

validate-required-pdf-form-fields-export.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields Before Exporting to JSON
validate-required-pdf-form-fields-export.description: The example loads a PDF form, checks that all fields marked as required have values, and exports the form data to a JSON file only when validation passes.

add-checkbox-field-to-pdf.title: Add Checkbox Field to Existing PDF
add-checkbox-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a new checkbox form field named 'AgreeTerms' to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Form.Add method.
